hero.desc: Exosome hair treatment supports your scalp and weak follicles with regenerative signals. A modern option for early thinning in Kuala Lumpur.

understanding.title1: If hair loss is hurting your confidence,
understanding.desc: Hair loss changes how you feel in photos, how you style your hair. In KL, we see this every day. Stress, hormones, genetics, and scalp inflammation can all play a role.
understanding.c1Desc: A key factor in hair thinning

whatIs.title: What is exosome hair treatment?
whatIs.subtitle: (In simple words)
whatIs.desc: Exosomes are tiny "message carriers" released by cells. They carry signals like proteins and genetic instructions that influence how other cells behave.
whatIs.notice: Important: Exosome therapies are still evolving. Evidence is growing, but regulation and product quality vary widely.

research.desc: Research is promising, but it's not "magic".
research.r1Desc: Consistent improvements in hair density and thickness across multiple studies
research.r2Desc: Exosomes vs PRP and minoxidil for androgenetic alopecia

safety.title: Safety and regulation
safety.subtitle: This matters more than marketing
safety.s1: The U.S. FDA has warned there are no FDA-approved exosome products
safety.s2: ISEV highlights uncertainties and importance of quality control
safety.s3: 2024 paper explains why product approvals face challenges
safety.adviceTitle: What you should do in Malaysia:
safety.adviceDesc: Choose a doctor-led clinic. Ask about product source and documentation. Avoid places that promise guaranteed regrowth or "permanent cure".

whoFor.title: Who is exosome hair treatment for?
whoFor.i1: Widening part lines or crown thinning

cost.title: Cost in Kuala Lumpur
cost.approachDesc: We recommend budgeting only after an assessment. Pay for a plan, not a promise.

faq.a1: It can be safe when done in a medical setting with proper product quality and hygiene. But the field still has uncertainties, and quality varies by supplier.
faq.q2: Is exosome therapy FDA approved for hair loss?
faq.a2: No. The FDA has stated there are no FDA-approved exosome products and has issued safety communications about unapproved exosome products.
faq.q3: How long does it take to work?
faq.a3: Many clinics describe visible improvement over 3 to 6 months, with earlier changes like reduced shedding sometimes appearing sooner.
faq.a4: Not always. Some respond well to PRP, some prefer exosomes. Many clinics combine approaches. The best choice depends on your diagnosis.
faq.a5: Yes. Many protocols are marketed for both men and women with thinning hair or shedding, especially in early stages.

cta.title: Ready to talk to a doctor in KL?
cta.desc: Start with an assessment at Nexus Clinic Kuala Lumpur. We'll explain what you actually need, what you can skip, and what results are realistic.
